concerns.text: The 'UCI DROP' dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/ucinlp/drop/...) is a Reading Comprehension dataset containing text passages and questions. It is NOT a 'Numerical' dataset with 'Reading comprehension scores' suitable for t-tests, ANOVA, or linear regression on continuous variables as claimed. The plan requires numerical variables for these tests; this dataset provides text, making it inappropriate for the stated statistical methodology without complex NLP feature extraction not mentioned in the plan.

The 'UCI Shopper' dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/jlh/uci-shopper/...) is cited as containing 'Purchase amount, time spent, categorical flags'. However, the specific HuggingFace path points to a generic UCI Shopper dataset which often lacks the specific 'Purchase amount' continuous variable required for the planned linear regression and ANOVA without verification. The plan asserts the presence of specific numerical variables ('Purchase amount') without confirming the schema of the cited URL matches the analysis needs (e.g., if the dataset only contains categorical flags, the regression plan fails).
